name: com.agentictrade/marketplace
title: AgenticTrade Marketplace
description: MCP server for AI agent commerce — discover, purchase, and consume API services with autonomous payments via x402 USDC on Base, PayPal, and 300+ cryptocurrencies.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICTRADE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your AgenticTrade API key (format: key_id:secret) for marketplace access

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICTRADE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the AgenticTrade marketplace API

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICTRADE_BUYER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your buyer/agent ID for balance queries
